originalAlarm.description: Value stored to '__codec_hw_write_2' is never read

sanitizedDescription: Value stored to 'codec_hw_write' is never read
presenceCondition:
(and (or (and (not CONFIG_SND_FSI_DA7210) CONFIG_SND_SOC_DA7210)
         CONFIG_SND_FSI_DA7210)
     (or (and (not CONFIG_SND_FSI_DA7210) CONFIG_I2C CONFIG_SND_SOC_DA7210)
         (and CONFIG_SND_FSI_DA7210 CONFIG_I2C)))
model:
(define-fun CONFIG_SND_SOC_DA7210 () Bool
  false)
(define-fun CONFIG_I2C () Bool
  true)
(define-fun CONFIG_SND_FSI_DA7210 () Bool
  true)
reasoning: codec_hw_write is assigned at L16 inside da7210_init (SOC_DA7210 AND I2C path) but never read — it is overwritten or the function returns before any use. No // ERROR at L16, so this is a new bug. PC = (FSI_DA7210 OR SOC_DA7210) AND I2C, with no library macros. Correctly constrained.
